tools.name: apps.createApp
tools.description: Creates an application.

tools.name: apps.createCampaign
tools.description: Creates a new campaign for an application or updates the settings of an existing campaign for an application.

tools.name: apps.createExportJob
tools.description: Creates an export job for an application.

tools.name: apps.createImportJob
tools.description: Creates an import job for an application.

tools.name: apps.createJourney
tools.description: Creates a journey for an application.

tools.name: apps.createSegment
tools.description: Creates a new segment for an application or updates the configuration, dimension, and other settings for an existing segment that's associated with an application.

tools.name: apps.deleteAdmChannel
tools.description: Disables the ADM channel for an application and deletes any existing settings for the channel.

tools.name: apps.deleteApnsChannel
tools.description: Disables the APNs channel for an application and deletes any existing settings for the channel.

tools.description: Disables the APNs sandbox channel for an application and deletes any existing settings for the channel.

tools.description: Disables the APNs VoIP sandbox channel for an application and deletes any existing settings for the channel.

tools.name: apps.deleteApp

tools.name: apps.deleteBaiduChannel
tools.description: Disables the Baidu channel for an application and deletes any existing settings for the channel.

tools.name: apps.deleteCampaign
tools.description: Deletes a campaign from an application.

tools.name: apps.deleteEmailChannel
tools.description: Disables the email channel for an application and deletes any existing settings for the channel.

tools.name: apps.deleteEndpoint

tools.name: apps.deleteEventStream
tools.description: Deletes the event stream for an application.

tools.name: apps.deleteGcmChannel
tools.description: Disables the GCM channel for an application and deletes any existing settings for the channel.

tools.description: Deletes a journey from an application.

tools.name: apps.deleteSegment
tools.description: Deletes a segment from an application.

tools.name: apps.deleteSmsChannel
tools.description: Disables the SMS channel for an application and deletes any existing settings for the channel.

tools.name: apps.deleteUserEndpoints
tools.description: Deletes all the endpoints that are associated with a specific user ID.

tools.name: apps.deleteVoiceChannel
tools.description: Disables the voice channel for an application and deletes any existing settings for the channel.

tools.name: apps.getApp

tools.description: Retrieves (queries) pre-aggregated data for a standard metric that applies to an application.

tools.name: apps.getApplicationSettings
tools.description: Retrieves information about the settings for an application.

tools.name: apps.getApps
tools.description: Retrieves information about all the applications that are associated with your Amazon Pinpoint account.

tools.description: Retrieves information about the status and settings of the Baidu channel for an application.

tools.description: Retrieves information about the status, configuration, and other settings for a campaign.

tools.name: apps.getEmailChannel
tools.description: Retrieves information about the status and settings of the email channel for an application.

tools.name: apps.getEndpoint
tools.description: Retrieves information about the settings and attributes of a specific endpoint for an application.

tools.name: apps.getEventStream
tools.description: Retrieves information about the event stream settings for an application.

tools.description: Retrieves information about the status and settings of a specific export job for an application.

tools.description: Retrieves information about the status and settings of all the export jobs for an application.

tools.name: apps.getGcmChannel
tools.description: Retrieves information about the status and settings of the GCM channel for an application.

tools.name: apps.getImportJobs
tools.description: Retrieves information about the status and settings of all the import jobs for an application.

tools.name: apps.getInAppMessages

tools.name: apps.putEvents
tools.description: Creates a new event to record for endpoints, or creates or updates endpoint data that existing events are associated with.

tools.name: apps.putEventStream
tools.description: Creates a new event stream for an application or updates the settings of an existing event stream for an application.

tools.name: apps.removeAttributes
tools.description: Removes one or more attributes, of the same attribute type, from all the endpoints that are associated with an application.

tools.name: apps.sendMessages
tools.description: Creates and sends a direct message.

tools.name: apps.sendOtpMessage
tools.description: Send an OTP message

tools.name: apps.sendUsersMessages
tools.description: Creates and sends a message to a list of users.

tools.name: apps.updateAdmChannel
tools.description: Enables the ADM channel for an application or updates the status and settings of the ADM channel for an application.

tools.name: apps.updateApnsChannel
tools.description: Enables the APNs channel for an application or updates the status and settings of the APNs channel for an application.

tools.name: apps.updateApnsSandboxChannel
tools.description: Enables the APNs sandbox channel for an application or updates the status and settings of the APNs sandbox channel for an application.

tools.name: apps.updateApnsVoipChannel
tools.description: Enables the APNs VoIP channel for an application or updates the status and settings of the APNs VoIP channel for an application.

tools.name: apps.updateApnsVoipSandboxChannel
tools.description: Enables the APNs VoIP sandbox channel for an application or updates the status and settings of the APNs VoIP sandbox channel for an application.

tools.name: apps.updateApplicationSettings
tools.description: Updates the settings for an application.

tools.name: apps.updateBaiduChannel
tools.description: Enables the Baidu channel for an application or updates the status and settings of the Baidu channel for an application.

tools.name: apps.updateCampaign
tools.description: Updates the configuration and other settings for a campaign.

tools.name: apps.updateEmailChannel
tools.description: Enables the email channel for an application or updates the status and settings of the email channel for an application.

tools.name: apps.updateEndpoint
tools.description: Creates a new endpoint for an application or updates the settings and attributes of an existing endpoint for an application. You can also use this operation to define custom attributes for an endpoint. If an update includes one or more values for a custom attribute, Amazon Pinpoint replaces (overwrites) any existing values with the new values.

tools.name: apps.updateEndpointsBatch
tools.description: Creates a new batch of endpoints for an application or updates the settings and attributes of a batch of existing endpoints for an application. You can also use this operation to define custom attributes for a batch of endpoints. If an update includes one or more values for a custom attribute, Amazon Pinpoint replaces (overwrites) any existing values with the new values.

tools.name: apps.updateGcmChannel
tools.description: Enables the GCM channel for an application or updates the status and settings of the GCM channel for an application.

tools.name: apps.updateJourney
tools.description: Updates the configuration and other settings for a journey.

tools.name: apps.updateJourneyState
tools.description: Cancels (stops) an active journey.

tools.name: apps.updateSegment
tools.description: Creates a new segment for an application or updates the configuration, dimension, and other settings for an existing segment that's associated with an application.

tools.name: apps.updateSmsChannel
tools.description: Enables the SMS channel for an application or updates the status and settings of the SMS channel for an application.

tools.name: apps.updateVoiceChannel
tools.description: Enables the voice channel for an application or updates the status and settings of the voice channel for an application.

tools.name: apps.verifyOtpMessage
tools.description: Verify an OTP

tools.name: phone.phoneNumberValidate
tools.description: Retrieves information about a phone number.

tools.description: Deletes an Amazon Pinpoint configuration for a recommender model.

tools.name: recommenders.updateRecommenderConfiguration
tools.description: Updates an Amazon Pinpoint configuration for a recommender model.

tools.name: tags.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Retrieves all the tags (keys and values) that are associated with an application, campaign, message template, or segment.

tools.name: tags.tagResource
tools.description: Adds one or more tags (keys and values) to an application, campaign, message template, or segment.

tools.name: tags.untagResource
tools.description: Removes one or more tags (keys and values) from an application, campaign, message template, or segment.

tools.name: templates.createEmailTemplate
tools.description: Creates a message template for messages that are sent through the email channel.

tools.description: Creates a new message template for messages using the in-app message channel.

tools.name: templates.createPushTemplate
tools.description: Creates a message template for messages that are sent through a push notification channel.

tools.description: Creates a message template for messages that are sent through the SMS channel.

tools.name: templates.createVoiceTemplate
tools.description: Creates a message template for messages that are sent through the voice channel.

tools.name: templates.deleteEmailTemplate
tools.description: Deletes a message template for messages that were sent through the email channel.

tools.name: templates.deleteInAppTemplate
tools.description: Deletes a message template for messages sent using the in-app message channel.

tools.name: templates.deletePushTemplate
tools.description: Deletes a message template for messages that were sent through a push notification channel.

tools.name: templates.deleteSmsTemplate
tools.description: Deletes a message template for messages that were sent through the SMS channel.

tools.name: templates.deleteVoiceTemplate
tools.description: Deletes a message template for messages that were sent through the voice channel.

tools.description: Retrieves the content and settings of a message template for messages sent through the in-app channel.

tools.description: Retrieves the content and settings of a message template for messages that are sent through a push notification channel.

tools.description: Retrieves the content and settings of a message template for messages that are sent through the SMS channel.

tools.name: templates.getVoiceTemplate
tools.description: Retrieves the content and settings of a message template for messages that are sent through the voice channel.

tools.name: templates.listTemplates

tools.name: templates.listTemplateVersions
tools.description: Retrieves information about all the versions of a specific message template.

tools.name: templates.updateEmailTemplate
tools.description: Updates an existing message template for messages that are sent through the email channel.

tools.name: templates.updateInAppTemplate
tools.description: Updates an existing message template for messages sent through the in-app message channel.

tools.name: templates.updatePushTemplate
tools.description: Updates an existing message template for messages that are sent through a push notification channel.

tools.name: templates.updateSmsTemplate
tools.description: Updates an existing message template for messages that are sent through the SMS channel.

tools.name: templates.updateTemplateActiveVersion
